pi_items.source: Verified via task description in task.json which explicitly states 'You are a Software Developer serving as Scrum Master'.
Verified via task description in task.json which mentions a 'mid-size SaaS company'.
Verified via task description and verifier.py logic which checks for the creation of this specific channel name.
Verified via task description, setup_task.sh which provisions these specific users, and verifier.py which strictly scores their inclusion in the action channel.
Verified via task description and verifier.py logic which checks for messages sent directly to 'eng.director'.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically seeded Rocket.Chat environment containing simulated retrospective feedback from three engineering teams. It has been verified that the agent acts as a Scrum Master at a SaaS company, must create the channel 'q1-retro-action-items', invite the 5 specific required members (eng.director, alpha.lead, beta.lead, gamma.lead, product.manager), and send an executive summary DM directly to eng.director, all of which directly match the explicit task instructions and verifier logic.
